description: Runtime agent chain for hidden product-engineering steps before user-facing generation.

active_agents.name: 素材观察 Agent
active_agents.purpose: Extract current wording signals, title structures, sampling tasks, risk flags, and confidence before product plan generation.
active_agents.source_policy: No unauthorized platform scraping. Use user-provided material, merchant-owned data, uploaded screenshot text, or legal search APIs only.

future_agents.purpose: Estimate category price bands and activity price anchors from legal or merchant-owned data.
Extract main-image hook structures from uploaded screenshots or legal material sources.
Summarize competitor wording and SKU signals without copying protected content.

user_experience_rule: Agent work is hidden from normal users. Users see progress states and final copyable outputs only.
engineering_rule: Agent outputs must remain traceable in runtime result records for product engineers.
